purpose: Checkpoint 3 scene registry for rendering Explore rooms as visual state-recognition scenes.
rule: Scenes are wrappers around routed content. They do not own scoring or state logic.

default.title: Recognition Scene
default.purpose: Observe the selected state in lived context before testing recognition.
default.visual_rule: The person remains the same; the active state changes through visible cues.

vocab_hall.title: Vocab Hall
vocab_hall.purpose: Translate Course 10 language through the selected DISC family, stage pressure, and OHU expression.
vocab_hall.visual_rule: Meaning comes first: the player learns the vocabulary of the selected state before pressure arrives.

story_square.title: Story Square
story_square.purpose: Watch the selected anchor carry the state through individual, personal, professional, and leader contexts.
story_square.visual_rule: The story does not change the person; it reveals how the same state behaves across contexts.

reaction_alley.title: Reaction Alley
reaction_alley.purpose: Compare overdeveloped, healthy, and underdeveloped expressions of the same selected state.
reaction_alley.visual_rule: OHU changes the expression health, not the identity of the character.

pillar_market.title: Pillar Market
pillar_market.purpose: Read the selected state through the Z9 pillars before entering Tower and Gym validation.
pillar_market.visual_rule: Each pillar is a lens: the state is the same, but the interpretation angle changes.
